action.reasoning: Observation: New best bal_acc=0.6146 (val_tau=0.613) via cRT 2-stage ResNet50 (Focal+mixup+sqrt-s1 50ep, CE+count-s2 40ep on head) + post-train tau=1.55 grid; few_shot=0.4458 (big gain), many/medium ~0.74/0.64. Iter~5min, 1.94h/13 iters left. Curves (prior) show stable convergence with stage2 lift. Analysis: Mixup+nesterov+tau-grid effective for CIFAR100-LT (IR=100); tail improved but head dropped slightly vs prior (tradeoff from high tau); base stage1 features can improve with longer training (80ep s1). No bugs in current full code (weights_only=False, best_tau save/load, proper freezing, metrics.jsonl). Decision: Edit train.py (increase s1=80ep for stronger feats while keeping s2=40ep total<130ep, finer tau grid step=0.05 0-3.0, keep mixup/nesterov/best-save/seeds, log only to metrics; no rewrite of model/predict). Run training then submit_eval immediately (follows >20ep rule, targets ~0.62 bal_acc).
